query: SELECT id, name, email, open_id, role, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Daniel%' OR name LIKE '%Lozano%' OR email LIKE '%daniel%' OR email LIKE '%lozano%' ORDER BY created_at DESC;
